'''vogamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lymphagogic|lymphagogic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lymphagogic|lymphagogic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vogamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vogamithi|vogamithi]] || [[word:vogamiji|vogamiji]] || [[word:vogamishi|vogamishi]] || [[word:vogamiki|vogamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vogamuthuthu|vogamuthuthu]] || [[word:vogamujuju|vogamujuju]] || [[word:vogamushushu|vogamushushu]] || [[word:vogamukuku|vogamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vogamuthu|vogamuthu]] || [[word:vogamuju|vogamuju]] || [[word:vogamushu|vogamushu]] || [[word:vogamuku|vogamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vogamufthuf|vogamufthuf]] || [[word:vogamufjuf|vogamufjuf]] || [[word:vogamufshuf|vogamufshuf]] || [[word:vogamufkuf|vogamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vogamethe|vogamethe]] || [[word:vogameje|vogameje]] || [[word:vogameshe|vogameshe]] || [[word:vogameke|vogameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vogamothotho|vogamothotho]] || [[word:vogamojojo|vogamojojo]] || [[word:vogamoshosho|vogamoshosho]] || [[word:vogamokoko|vogamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vogamotho|vogamotho]] || [[word:vogamojo|vogamojo]] || [[word:vogamosho|vogamosho]] || [[word:vogamoko|vogamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vogamofthof|vogamofthof]] || [[word:vogamofjof|vogamofjof]] || [[word:vogamofshof|vogamofshof]] || [[word:vogamofkof|vogamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfthÃŸf|vogamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfjÃŸf|vogamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfshÃŸf|vogamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfkÃŸf|vogamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vogamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vogamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vogamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vogamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfthÃŸf|vogamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfjÃŸf|vogamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfshÃŸf|vogamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfkÃŸf|vogamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfthÃŸf|vogamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfjÃŸf|vogamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfshÃŸf|vogamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vogamÃŸfkÃŸf|vogamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vogamÃḊthÃḊ|vogamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vogamÃḊjÃḊ|vogamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vogamÃḊshÃḊ|vogamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vogamÃḊkÃḊ|vogamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vogamathatha|vogamathatha]] || [[word:vogamajaja|vogamajaja]] || [[word:vogamashasha|vogamashasha]] || [[word:vogamakaka|vogamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vogamatha|vogamatha]] || [[word:vogamaja|vogamaja]] || [[word:vogamasha|vogamasha]] || [[word:vogamaka|vogamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vogamafthaf|vogamafthaf]] || [[word:vogamafjaf|vogamafjaf]] || [[word:vogamafshaf|vogamafshaf]] || [[word:vogamafkaf|vogamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vogamasha|vogamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vogamshÃḋsha|vogamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vogamrosha|vogamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vogamusha|vogamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vogamyasha|vogamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govogamnkshÃḋsha|govogamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govogamnkrosha|govogamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govogamnkmusha|govogamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govogamnkyasha|govogamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vogagamasha|vogagamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vogagamshÃḋsha|vogagamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vogagamrosha|vogagamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vogagamusha|vogagamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vogagamyasha|vogagamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govogagamnkshÃḋsha|govogagamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govogagamnkrosha|govogagamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govogagamnkmusha|govogagamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govogagamnkyasha|govogagamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vegÃḊmasha|vegÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vegÃḊmshÃḋsha|vegÃḊmshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vegÃḊmrosha|vegÃḊmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vegÃḊmusha|vegÃḊmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vegÃḊmyasha|vegÃḊmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govegÃḊmnkshÃḋsha|govegÃḊmnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govegÃḊmnkrosha|govegÃḊmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govegÃḊmnkmusha|govegÃḊmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govegÃḊmnkyasha|govegÃḊmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vogfamasha|vogfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vogfamshÃḋsha|vogfamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vogfamrosha|vogfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vogfamusha|vogfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vogfamyasha|vogfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govogfamnkshÃḋsha|govogfamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govogfamnkrosha|govogfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govogfamnkmusha|govogfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govogfamnkyasha|govogfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
